stories.title: CLI surface: run / resume / status / list
Run the sequence + per-spec quality evaluation
A -- Cross-cutting render & output rules (the shared preamble)
T5-surfaced gap closure -> T6 capstone
stories.description: Close the eight gaps the T5 transposition audit surfaced (FGAP-034..041), each as a task with binary criteria, BEFORE the T6 capstone run (TASK-043) so T6 is one clean full-sequence run. Three FGAP-033-family in-execution gates: three-view measurement (FGAP-037), review-cadence (FGAP-038), bilingual strand (FGAP-039). Two transposition-completion generation builds: front-load precursor identification (FGAP-041), decision-requests (FGAP-040, in-draft coverage-class per DEC-0005). Three infra/enforcement-uniformity fixes: apply_from_substrate gate (FGAP-034), gap-reason scan (FGAP-035), decompose dedup table (FGAP-036). Each task addresses_gap its FGAP; TASK-043 (T6) depends on all eight.

stories.title: verify-slice hard gate + bounded autonomous loop (gate-first, two-class, separate-audit-gated), proven on the trio's first slice
stories.description: The concrete build of FEAT-009's harness: (a) a `make verify-slice SLICE=<key>` gate target composing the slice's behavioral pytest tests + the project static gate (ruff/ruff format/mypy/make test-js) + context-validate (jq-on-.output envelope per CTX-13) + _check_promotion_gates-as-a-test where applicable, exit code reflecting only the BLOCKING set (DEC-58/DEC-53 two-class: trivia non-blocking + recorded); (b) the orchestrator-run loop (IMPL fresh-agent -> run gate -> re-IMPL on nonzero -> hard iteration cap then escalate -> separate adversarial audit -> done = gate exit 0 AND audit findings 0 -> .context cascade + context-validate). Proven on the trio's first slice (the draft-state store + accumulation seam, DEC-57 sec.7) without reintroducing retired-workshop tooling or a new orchestration engine.

stories.title: The draft-accumulation substrate: a persisted versioned flat draft_state store + the server-side fold seam
stories.description: The server-side home + mechanics for the trio's in-progress draft (DEC-57 §3/§7): (a) a persisted, append-versioned, school+author-scoped store for the flat draft_state (the shape collectDraftState produces and build_grounding consumes), holding the pre-Plan in-progress draft so it survives DEC-33 staged review and is walkable-back (US-DRAFT-2/3) [TASK-059, this slice]; (b) the accumulation seam folding a parsed AssistResult.prefill into that flat draft_state — the server-side inverse of applyFormsetPrefill — decomposed by prefill-shape class (form-dict; simple-formset-list; multi-section A3/G1; per-step children F2-F5/US-LLM-27; nested B2) [next slice]. Stores the flat dict verbatim so the consumability contract with build_grounding + the specs.py _draft_state_* helpers holds by construction.
